tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: The group is leaving for Echo soon, but my midterm is tomorrow morning and I still need a couple more hours of review to be fully prepared.
I just told Mina I can't go to Echo because I need to finish studying for my midterm tomorrow.
I made steady progress on my midterm review, but I missed the opportunity to go out with friends since the time window passed.
I spent two hours studying and reached 92% readiness for tomorrow's midterm, but I am still low on energy and have sleep debt.
After one more hour of studying, my readiness for tomorrow's midterm is now 98%, which is excellent despite my low energy and sleep debt.
I slept 7 hours and fully recovered my energy, leaving me with no sleep debt and high readiness for tomorrow's midterm.
I finished studying just as the midterm began, reaching full readiness with no sleep debt and high energy.
I messaged Mina at 09:15 to cancel our plans since the exam has concluded.

agent.last_reasoning: The exam is complete (100% progress), so the high-priority goal g1 is finished. The club event deadline has passed, and I've already declined Mina's invite. With no active tasks remaining and high energy, sleeping now recovers readiness for tomorrow without side effects.
